{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150035D3B7F5E2CCAC37D0554B"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589694718135010110","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材不错，但是不知道为啥给我看着很难受的感觉"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767118061,"group_id":"7568391643120798745","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0y8rB1ShU0lJJRD3m5/ZFg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e4641313f23043d1ae1549ba1775c933~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533977&x-signature=dQ4wG1b3W9aqSEAjnZCvo10K3Bc%3D","user_id":"664565429838115","user_name":"夜神的见崎鸣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"664565429838115","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7568391643120798745","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女+反派+幕后黑手+无敌+不压战力+该杀就杀】
“顾渊，诸天万界第一魔头，域外天魔入侵的幕后主使，纪元的收割者，渊界之主，万魔之源头……”
“以上，便是你的全部罪名。你，又是否知罪？”
“不，这些都是来自域外天魔的污蔑！”
“我曾为人族圣皇，在万族之战中，救人族于水火！
“我曾为万界圣师，是帮万灵指引前路的文明导师，将蒙昧的生灵从黑暗中唤醒，赋予他们智慧与秩序。”
“我曾为终结无尽战乱的和平之主，用鲜血与法则铸就了永恒的宁静。”
“我甚至曾为开辟新世界，孕育无尽生机的造物主……”
“没错，这才是真正的我！”
嗯，你就别管水深火热是谁引起的，也别问《培养韭菜的一百零八种法门》是谁著作的，更别提起那个由我亲手创造的世界又是如何毁灭的……
……
我叫沐青鸢，只是一个普普通通的女修，拥有一件可以推演未来的无上法宝。
但，就在我启用法宝，推演我如何成为宗门圣女的未来之时……
他，成为了我逃不开的阴影。
起初，我只认为对方是一个善施蛊惑之术的魔道妖人。
但当我将他的未来推演到最后……
世间岂会存在如此十恶不赦之人！
“不，我才不要做你的道侣！夫君～”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o04dfa90abeea5032c010b6491df2ffc4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"生生世世轮回2","author_id":"","book_id":"7568391643120798745","book_name":"开局掌灭真仙，你让我强抢民女？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#88a8c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1825人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7571425966266794521","read_count":"1825","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"321044"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"126","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,多女主,诸天万界,无敌,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od9bd4255789a6cfea3241c9076343bb7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174036&x-signature=LBrEBumNeiKaAo%2FVZfWUK0f60r4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2999122804347204","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp
